creator: gondim@bsdinfo.com.br
text:
portaudit not detect the vulnerability of phpmyadmin.
This is the second time this happens with phpmyadmin, this month.

How-To-Repeat: (root@zeus)[~]# portaudit -Fda
auditfile.tbz                                 100% of   68 kB   67 kBps
New database installed.
Database created: Tue Jul 26 07:20:00 BRT 2011
0 problem(s) in your installed packages found.

(root@zeus)[~]# bzcat /var/db/portaudit/auditfile.tbz |more
